visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white knitted cardigan over a black top and a white layered skirt, stands in a brightly lit warehouse supermarket aisle. She smiles and points her right hand toward a refrigerated shelf filled with large clear plastic food containers. A large red and blue brand logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera moves closer to the display shelf, showing stacks of plastic containers filled with folded crepes topped with powdered sugar and mango chunks. Handheld shots show the woman picking up two large boxes of the crepes, exhibiting a playful and excited expression. Background shoppers are visible but blurred. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where two women are seated at a wooden table. The first woman and a second woman wearing a blue bucket hat and a black top are holding and eating the mango crepes. They use their hands to tear pieces, showing the creamy mango filling to the camera while reacting with happy facial expressions and nodding. Decorative plush toys and a pet enclosure are visible in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Variety]: 很多人買. [Variety]: threads 爆紅的. [Slogan]: 芒果可麗餅 真的好吃嗎？ (3) [Subtitle]: 哇 這也太多了吧. (4) [Subtitle]: 新鮮芒果可麗餅. (5) [Subtitle]: 聽說很厲害哦. (6) [Subtitle]: 現在是芒果的季節了嗎？ (7) [Subtitle]: 應該是吧. (8) [Variety]: 美味. (9) [Subtitle]: 好啦 給你買一個. (10) [Subtitle]: 只能買一個 不能買兩隻. (11) [Subtitle]: 小姐小姐 可以吧. (12) [Subtitle]: 一吃一口 一下就沒了. (13) [Subtitle]: 你一口吃的一下 我服你. (14) [Subtitle]: 哎真的嗎 真的嗎. (15) [Subtitle]: 難怪那麼多人都喜歡. (16) [Slogan]: 新鮮芒果可麗餅. (17) [Subtitle]: 絕對不要錯過. (18) [Slogan]: 只要50塊 一盒399. (19) [Variety]: 十分高.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 10 shoppers visible in the background of the supermarket scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The primary character has long straight black hair, wearing a white cardigan and white skirt. The second main character wears a blue bucket hat and a black lace-trimmed top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is set inside a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving, refrigerators, and multiple shoppers with carts. The second half is a domestic living room with a wooden table, a yellow plush toy, and a pet cage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy electronic pop background music with a steady 124 BPM dance beat begins. An energetic male narrator provides a lively introduction, followed by a bright, high-pitched female response. The mix is clean with voices well above the music level. (2) A sharp plastic rustling sound triggers as the camera zooms in on food containers. The male and female continue a playful conversational dialogue with moderate vocal arousal. Faint supermarket ambient noise is audible in the background floor. (3) A digital 'ding' sound effect transitions to the tasting phase. Two female voices engage in rapid, overlapping speech with high positive valence and excitement. Audible chewing and lip-smacking sounds are present during the review. The music remains consistent throughout the sequence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Discovery -> Product Showcase -> Tasting Review -> Final Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote a popular mango crepe product from Costco, leveraging social media trends ('threads') to engage viewers and provide a subjective taste evaluation based on cost-performance ratio.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the Costco logo prominently and provides the specific price (399 TWD) and quantity, encouraging purchase based on a positive review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social media editing style with colorful captions and upbeat music designed for quick engagement and virality.
